hooks.command: TODAY=$(date '+%Y-%m-%d'); NOW=$(date '+%A %H:%M'); LOG=/Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101/state/session-log.md; mkdir -p /Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101/state; if [ ! -f "$LOG" ] || ! head -1 "$LOG" | grep -q "$TODAY"; then echo "# Session Log — $TODAY" > "$LOG"; fi; echo "- $NOW" >> "$LOG"; /Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101/scripts/hooks/break-check.sh

STATE=/Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101/state/pre-compact-snapshot.md; LOCK=/Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101/LOCKBOARD.md; mkdir -p /Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101/state; echo '---' >> "$STATE" && echo "Compaction at: $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" >> "$STATE" && echo "Branch: $(git -C /Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101 branch --show-current 2>/dev/null)" >> "$STATE" && echo '' >> "$STATE" && echo '## Lockboard snapshot' >> "$STATE" && cat "$LOCK" >> "$STATE" 2>/dev/null && echo '' >> "$STATE" && echo '## Recent git' >> "$STATE" && git -C /Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101 log --oneline -5 >> "$STATE" 2>/dev/null && echo '' >> "$STATE" && echo '## Uncommitted' >> "$STATE" && git -C /Users/andreacrespo/CLAUDE/city101 status --short >> "$STATE" 2>/dev/null
